bridge_equation_v37.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v37 = mix(B_plastic_v36, L_sys_band, 1 - P_sys_band, D_feature_v31, 1 - G_brain_v31)
bridge_equation_v37.structure_term: B_struct_v37 = mix(B_struct_v36, S_sys_band, R_sys_band, 1 - P_sys_band, D_structure_v31)
bridge_equation_v37.readiness_term: R_train_v37 = mix(R_train_v36, B_plastic_v37, B_struct_v37, R_sys_band, D_align_v31, 1 - P_sys_band)

project_readout.summary: training bridge v37 checks whether systemic low-risk band extension begins to reduce rule-layer risk in a more coherent and wider way.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this band extension still survives after it is folded into the next closed-form core.
